name: Aalto University
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: BSc 12,000-15,000 EUR/yr, MSc 15,000-20,000 EUR/yr. EU/EEA: FREE. 25% first-year early bird discount. Student union fee 65 EUR + healthcare 72 EUR/yr (aalto.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + SAT (some programmes) + IELTS 6.5 (no band <6.0) or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 (no band <6.0) or TOEFL 92 + GMAT/GRE (business programmes). BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

name: University of Helsinki
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: BSc 13,000 EUR/yr; MSc 13,000-18,000 EUR/yr depending on programme. EU/EEA: FREE. Scholarships available (helsinki.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + entrance exam + IELTS 6.5 (no section <6.0) or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate with strong academics
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 (no section <6.0) or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree from recognised university

name: University of Turku
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: 2,000-12,000 EUR/yr avg ~11,000 EUR depending on programme. EU/EEA: FREE. Scholarships cover up to 100% (utu.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 79-92 depending on programme. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

name: University of Oulu
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: base 10,000 EUR/yr. 20% discount (9,000 EUR) with 60 ECTS/yr. EU/EEA: FREE (oulu.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 86. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 86. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree from recognised university

name: Tampere University
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: BSc 10,000 EUR/yr; MSc 12,000 EUR/yr (from 2026). EU/EEA: FREE. Scholarships available (tuni.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

name: University of Jyväskylä
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: 8,000-16,000 EUR/yr depending on programme. EU/EEA: FREE. Early Bird discount 1,500 EUR (jyu.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 79-92. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

name: LUT University (Lappeenranta-Lahti University of Technology)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: BSc 12,000 EUR/yr; MSc 15,000 EUR/yr; Double degree 12,000 EUR/yr. EU/EEA: FREE. Early bird BSc -2,000 EUR, MSc -5,000 EUR (lut.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 78 + entrance exam/SAT. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc in engineering/science/business + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

name: University of Eastern Finland
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: 8,000-10,000 EUR/yr depending on programme. EU/EEA: FREE. 30-50% tuition waivers available. Early bird discount 500 EUR (uef.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 79-92. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

name: Åbo Akademi University
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~12,000 EUR/yr (MSc). Early commitment discount 4,000 EUR. EU/EEA: FREE. Swedish-language university (abo.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. Most BSc in Swedish/Finnish. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

name: University of Vaasa
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: BSc 10,000 EUR/yr; MSc 14,000 EUR/yr (from autumn 2025). EU/EEA: FREE. Scholarships available (uwasa.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92 + GMAT (some programmes). BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

name: University of Lapland
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: BSc 8,000 EUR/yr; MSc 13,000 EUR/yr. Early bird 10% discount. 25% of students get 100% tuition waiver 1st year. EU/EEA: FREE (ulapland.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate
masterRequirements: BSc (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree

masterRequirements: BSc in business/economics + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 92 + GMAT. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree in relevant field

name: University of the Arts Helsinki
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: 28,000 EUR/yr (from Aug 2026). No scholarships from 2026. EU/EEA: FREE. Academies: Sibelius (music), Theatre, Fine Arts (uniarts.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary + artistic aptitude test / audition + IELTS 5.5-6.5 depending on programme. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + portfolio/audition
masterRequirements: BSc/BA in arts + audition/portfolio + IELTS 6.0-6.5. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor degree in relevant arts field

name: National Defence University
tuitionNote: Military university; admission restricted to Finnish Defence Forces personnel. Not open to international civilian students (mpkk.fi)
bachelorRequirements: Finnish military service + entrance exam. NOT open to international students
masterRequirements: Officer's degree + military service. NOT open to international students

name: Metropolia University of Applied Sciences
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~10,000-11,000 EUR/yr. EU/EEA: FREE. Early bird discount 1,000 EUR. Largest UAS in Finland (metropolia.fi)
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary diploma + UAS entrance exam + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 79. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + entrance exam
masterRequirements: BSc/BA (210 ECTS) + 2yr work experience + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 79. BD/PK/IN: 4-yr bachelor + 2yr work experience
